---
title: "Elizabeth Emily Maconchy"
---

## Elizabeth Emily Maconchy

**Dates:** (1848/9-1927)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society

### Biography

A Gosling as ‘Potatoe’ c. 1866/-after 1869, she was third daughter of George Maconchy (1818-1889) of Rathmore, co. Longford and Corrinagh, Torquay, and Louisa Richards (d. 1864). She married (1880), as his second wife, Richard Mallock (d. 1900), MP for Torquay [LG 1871, LGI 1914;  LG 1906 Mallock; 1881 census]

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 5 th 1900
- Letter from Ash Wednesday [6 March 1867?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
